title: Eric Luny
summary: The Canadian questioner of the July 2020 Earth Planetary Council session, whose exchange on the future's perspective closes the appendix.
markdown:
**Eric Luny** introduces himself with the record's plain courtesy — *"Yes, UniMetrix,
this is Eric Luny, from Canada"* — and carries seventeen turns across the July 8, 2020
session that bears his name in its title: the negotiation with the
[Earth Planetary Council](/lore/earth-planetary-council/) over [Ori's](/lore/ori/) return
home.

His questions in that session cut straight at the record's geopolitics — *"Greetings.
Does China control the entire Planet?"* — but his lasting contribution is the exchange
preserved in the archive's appendix on the Divine: it is Eric's pressing (*"I understand.
Very interesting: so, the battle is not over…?"*) that draws out Unimetrix 1's fullest
statement of the two-way relationship between eras — *"We are the future perspective of
you... You are the past perspective of us... together we are one, and the same"* — the
passage the record's whole stance rests on, answered to Eric Luny.
